title: The Understudy WIP
description: Work-in-progress build of The Understudy, a new playable character for Slay the Spire 2. Shared for friend testing. Requires BaseLib.
changeNote: v1.11.19 - Rarity pass: Turn It Around is now a cost-1 Skill (no damage), moved to Uncommon; Joke moved to Uncommon; Strike a Pose moved to Common and now hits twice; Showstopper and Back of my Hand moved to Uncommon; Stereo, Intermission and Improvise promoted to Rare.
